Column2: When the life science scientist (LSS) clicks the help button on the main screen, a new window opens that contains a brief explanation about when to use each of the tools on the main screen.
Column3: The life science scientist (LSS) enters protein sequence in FASTA format or FASTA file of protein in the BLASTP screen. The LSS selects the correct settings, uploads a custom database if desired (uses UniProt database otherwise), and presses the BLAST button once finished. The output of the BLASTP is stored in the downloads folder of the user and shown in a new screen.
Column4: The life science scientist (LSS) enters a protein or DNA sequence in the text box in the statistics screen and presses the statistics button. Subsequently, the statistics of the DNA or protein sequence are shown on the same screen.
